message:
fix: replace fragile string parsing with json.Unmarshal in findCleanupWisp (gt-kke3r0)

findCleanupWisp used manual string-based JSON extraction despite
encoding/json already being imported and used elsewhere in the file.
Replace with proper json.Unmarshal for robustness against whitespace,
escaping, and field ordering variations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
